name: Before / after metrics
when_to_use: 需要用一组同口径指标说明改版、迁移、优化或实验前后的变化时用它，适合效果复盘、数据探索结论和交付报告。若只有一个 KPI 应改用大数字卡；若有连续时间序列，应改用折线图而不是把多个时间点硬塞成 before/after。
why_valuable: 只列两列数字会迫使读者自行心算，也容易把“越低越好”的指标误判；本模板同时计算绝对 Δ 与百分比，保留单位和精度，并用 higherIsBetter 正确标记改善、回退与持平。

data_in.note: data.metrics 是逐行指标表。每行 before 与 after 必须是有限数字；模板计算 change=after-before，百分比按 change/abs(before) 计算，before=0 时百分比显示 —。prefix 与 unit 分别放在数字前后，precision 控制 0–6 位小数。higherIsBetter 默认为 true；设为 false 时数值下降会用绿色表示改善。

schema.title?: string —— 报告标题；省略时显示 “Before & after”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 对比范围、版本或时间窗口
schema.metrics[].label: string —— 指标名称
schema.metrics[].unit?: string —— 数字后缀，例如 %、 ms、 s
schema.metrics[].precision?: number —— 显示小数位，整数 0–6；默认 1
schema.metrics[].higherIsBetter?: boolean —— true 表示上升为改善，false 表示下降为改善；默认 true

spec.note: 按指标行数增高；表格最小宽度约 690px，窄载体内横向滚动以保持 before→after、绝对 Δ 与百分比同轴，不使用固定高度。

example._why: 同一产品发布的增长、速度、流失和质量指标同时包含“越高越好”与“越低越好”，能验证箭头、绝对差、百分比和语义颜色。

minimal.title: Checkout redesign impact
minimal.subtitle: 28-day windows before and after the April release

uplink: 纯 display-only 组件，无 uplink；渲染结果只在当前 shadow root 中展示，不向 AI 或宿主回传状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a consistent set of metrics to explain changes before and after a redesign, migration, optimization, or experiment; it suits outcome reviews, data-exploration findings, and delivery reports. For a single KPI, use a big-number card instead. For a continuous time series, use a line chart rather than forcing multiple time points into before/after.
en.why_valuable: Two columns of numbers force readers to calculate mentally and make lower-is-better metrics easy to misread. This template calculates absolute delta and percentage together, preserves units and precision, and uses higherIsBetter to label improvement, regression, and no change correctly.

data_in.note: data.metrics is a row-oriented metrics table. before and after must be finite numbers in every row. The template calculates change=after-before and percentage as change/abs(before); when before=0, percentage displays -. prefix and unit appear before and after the number respectively, and precision controls 0-6 decimal places. higherIsBetter defaults to true; when false, a lower value is shown in green as an improvement.

schema.title?: string -- Report title; shows "Before & after" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- Comparison scope, version, or time window
schema.metrics[].label: string -- Metric name
schema.metrics[].before: number -- Baseline value before the change
schema.metrics[].after: number -- Result value after the change
schema.metrics[].unit?: string -- Numeric suffix, for example %, ms, or s
schema.metrics[].precision?: number -- Displayed decimal places, integer 0-6; default 1
schema.metrics[].higherIsBetter?: boolean -- true means an increase is an improvement; false means a decrease is an improvement; default true

spec.note: Height grows with metric rows. The table has a minimum width of about 690px and scrolls horizontally in narrow carriers to keep before -> after, absolute delta, and percentage aligned; it does not use a fixed height.
